svg.text: McCzarny recently made significant updates
across his projects. In chromium-daily-digest,
he implemented a versioning system for the
generated index page, allowing clients to
detect and prompt for newer versions. He also
improved the reliability of the digest
generation by fixing daily rate limit detection
and adding logic to use a backup AI model if
limits are hit, alongside removing delays and
trying smarter models. For crater-js, he
focused heavily on core gameplay and world
mechanics. He introduced randomized starting
positions, a world map with race selection, and
fall damage that scales with distance. Movement
mechanics were refined with slower vertical
climbing, and UI received enhancements like
automatic movement for direction buttons and
region modifier tooltips. He also added an
"Essence Potion" item, adjusted game balance,
and improved character visual feedback with
action tinting. Lastly, in
flexible-log-analyzer, McCzarny automated the
publishing process for the VS Code extension to
the Open VSX Registry using new GitHub Actions
workflows, streamlining deployment with steps
for building, testing, and packaging.
Generated on: Sun Jun 28 04:15:47 2026
